footer.description: Solid Distributed Systems SRL provides IT services and AI solutions, specializing in cloud, platform engineering, automation, and AI integration.
footer.copyright: Copyright reserved by Solid Distributed Systems SRL - 2026

about.subtitle: SOLID DISTRIBUTED SYSTEMS SRL
about.heading: IT consultancy and AI services
about.text: Solid Distributed Systems brings together senior specialists to deliver IT consultancy, AI services, and ADR (AI Data Refinery). We help teams modernize infrastructure, adopt cloud-native practices, and integrate AI into their workflows — through structured consultancy packages, custom AI solutions, and a curated data platform with MCP and API access.

aboutPage.subtitle: About Our Company
aboutPage.heading: Senior execution for modern infrastructure and AI
aboutPage.text: Solid Distributed Systems combines IT consultancy, AI services, and ADR (AI Data Refinery) into a focused offering for teams that need real results. We help organizations modernize their platforms, adopt AI workflows, and access curated data — with the technical depth and delivery discipline expected from senior specialists.

services.subtitle: Our Offerings
services.heading: IT consultancy and AI-ready data products
services.text: Built for serious buyers: senior-led IT consultancy in clear service tiers, plus ADR, our curated data platform for AI systems.
services.service1Text: High-seniority consultancy packages covering architecture, DevOps, cloud platforms, automation, reliability, and delivery strategy.
services.service2Text: Curated, up-to-date data products for AI systems, delivered with MCP connectivity and API access for production use.
services.service3Text: Engagements can be structured in clear service tiers so clients can choose the right depth of support and execution.
services.service4Text: ADR is designed for direct integration into AI workflows through managed MCP endpoints and traditional API consumption.
services.ctaHeading: Ready to modernize your stack or power your AI systems?
services.ctaText: Talk to Solid Distributed Systems about advanced consultancy packages or ADR access.

servicesPage.subtitle: What we offer
servicesPage.heading: IT consultancy and AI Services
servicesPage.text: Access the pages below to send us a request and get your customized offer.
servicesPage.itText: Senior-led consulting covering cloud platforms, DevOps, platform engineering, Kubernetes, automation, and security. Structured as tiered packages so clients choose the right depth of advisory, implementation, and ongoing support.
servicesPage.aiText: AI solutions tailored to your business, from custom AI workflows and agent integrations to ADR (AI Data Refinery) — a curated, continuously updated data platform designed for AI systems. Delivered with MCP connectivity and API access for direct integration into LLM tools, copilots, and internal AI platforms.

contact.reachOut: Reach out to discuss your IT challenges, explore our consultancy packages, or learn more about our AI services and ADR platform. We are happy to provide details on pricing, scope, and how we can best support your needs.

team.teamTitle: Senior specialists in platform, cloud, and AI delivery
team.teamText1: A high-seniority delivery team built for complex infrastructure, resilient platforms, and AI-ready data systems.
team.teamText2: We help organizations modernize architecture, improve delivery performance, strengthen operational reliability, and build trustworthy data flows for AI systems. Our work combines strategic consulting with hands-on execution.
team.skill2: Platform engineering, Kubernetes, GitOps, and automation
team.skill4: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform and Terragrunt
team.skill6: Data delivery patterns for AI systems, including MCP and API integration
team.skill7: Cloudflare, observability stacks, and production operations
team.skill8: Infrastructure planning, migration, and modernization programs
team.engagement1: Design and scale modern cloud and platform foundations
team.engagement2: Build and improve CI/CD, GitOps, and release processes
team.engagement3: Develop Infrastructure as Code and operational automation
team.engagement4: Improve reliability, scalability, cost control, and security posture
team.engagement5: Support architecture transformation and platform modernization
team.engagement6: Deliver curated, maintained data access layers for AI use cases
team.engagement7: Design AI-ready, future-proof systems that can evolve with new tools, models, and operating demands
